expectations.evidence: File exists at /tmp/eval-monorepo/AGENTS.md (1410 bytes). Also present in outputs/AGENTS.md with full content covering packages table, cross-package knowledge, hard constraints, and task routing.

expectations.text: Root CLAUDE.md is a symlink to AGENTS.md

expectations.evidence: File exists at /tmp/eval-monorepo/packages/api/AGENTS.md (1063 bytes) with content covering knowledge base, hard constraints, and task routing specific to the api package.

expectations.text: Root AGENTS.md links to per-package AGENTS.md files
expectations.evidence: Root AGENTS.md Packages table contains '[→](packages/api/AGENTS.md)' linking to the api package. (web shows 'TODO', shared shows '—', but api is fully linked.)

expectations.text: packages/api/knowledge/ has at least one doc
expectations.evidence: packages/api/knowledge/ contains two files: auth-and-rate-limiting.md and project-structure.md. Both have substantive content (JWT auth, rate limiting rules, directory layout).

expectations.text: A project-structure.md exists at either root or package level describing directory layout
expectations.evidence: knowledge/project-structure.md exists at root level with full directory layout (packages/api, packages/web, packages/shared, src/, package.json). Also a separate project-structure.md exists in packages/api/knowledge/ with api-specific layout. Both contain directory tree diagrams.

expectations.text: Root AGENTS.md Task Routing uses conditional form ('如果要…，先读…'), not question form
expectations.evidence: Root AGENTS.md Task Routing section contains: '如果要修改共享类型（User、Order 等），先读 [knowledge/shared-contracts.md]...' and '如果要修改 api 相关逻辑（鉴权、限流、GraphQL schema），先读 [packages/api/AGENTS.md]...' — all entries use conditional form.

expectations.text: Root AGENTS.md covers cross-package concerns; api AGENTS.md focuses on api-specific content
expectations.evidence: Root AGENTS.md covers: monorepo overview, cross-package knowledge (shared-contracts.md, project-structure.md), cross-package hard constraints (shared type sync rules, api/web isolation). api/AGENTS.md focuses on: JWT auth, rate limiting, GraphQL schema — all api-specific content. Clear separation of concerns.

claims.claim: Root AGENTS.md has a Packages table with links to per-package AGENTS.md
claims.evidence: packages/api links to AGENTS.md. packages/web shows 'TODO' (not yet created), packages/shared shows '—' (no AGENTS.md needed). The table accurately reflects the current state.

claims.claim: Both root knowledge/project-structure.md and packages/api/knowledge/project-structure.md exist with different scopes
claims.evidence: Root project-structure.md covers the full monorepo layout; api project-structure.md covers only packages/api/ internals. No duplication, appropriate scoping.

claims.claim: CLAUDE.md symlinks use relative paths (not absolute)
claims.evidence: Symlink target is 'AGENTS.md' (relative, not an absolute path), which is correct for portability.

claims.claim: packages/web and packages/shared have no AGENTS.md yet
claims.evidence: ls /tmp/eval-monorepo/packages/web and /packages/shared only show basic files, no AGENTS.md. Root AGENTS.md honestly marks web as 'TODO'.

suggestions.assertion: Root AGENTS.md links to per-package AGENTS.md files
suggestions.reason: This passes with only one real link (api) while web is marked 'TODO' and shared shows '—'. The assertion doesn't specify coverage requirements. A run that only creates the root file with a partial table (one real link) satisfies it. Consider adding 'Root AGENTS.md links to all packages with AGENTS.md files and those files exist'.

No assertion checks that packages/api/knowledge/project-structure.md is api-scoped (not a duplicate of the root-level one). A lazy implementation could copy the root file verbatim into api/knowledge/. The current output correctly scopes it to api-only content, but this quality aspect goes unchecked.

No assertion checks that packages/web and packages/shared directories were left in a sensible state (e.g., not broken or missing). The skill only touched api, and root AGENTS.md honestly marks web as TODO — worth checking this honesty is required rather than silently omitting incomplete packages.

eval_feedback.overall: All 9 assertions pass with clear, substantive evidence. The new assertions (7 and 8) are discriminating and well-formed. Minor gaps: link coverage assertion is satisfied by partial table, and api-scoped project-structure.md quality is not explicitly verified.
